model_prompt: Produce a revised version of the student.agent.md prompt that addresses the following issues identified in the engineer-prompt review: (1) add an explicit evidence reading order before planning, (2) replace the vague teacher-handoff trigger with observable workspace conditions, (3) add a three-outcome stopping rule for the self-check step, (4) add a concise inline scope boundary for 'smallest defensible revision', (5) consolidate the engineer-handoff condition into a single location and remove the duplicate in the approach section, (6) add a fixed output template with labeled sections, (7) add a missing-steering fallback.
